subject: [PATCH v6 08/10] dax/kmem: extract hotplug/hotremove helper functions

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch refactors the kmem probe and remove functions by extracting initialization, cleanup, hotplug, and hot-remove logic into separate helper functions. The helpers enable future extensions to support more granular control over memory hotplug operations. The patch splits hotplug/hotunplug and init/cleanup to make resources available for hot-add, allowing re-use of the hotunplug code without destroying underlying resources.
